name: Codex Bridge
description: Claims paired Feishu DMs and runs Codex as a remote task executor

locale.label: Locale
locale.help: Controls bridge copy and the target language for Codex task summaries.

defaultCwd.label: Default CWD
defaultCwd.help: Default working directory used for new Feishu Codex tasks.

codexHome.label: Codex Home
codexHome.help: Isolated CODEX_HOME used by the remote runner.

codexBin.label: Codex Binary
codexBin.help: Codex CLI executable name or path.

authJsonPath.label: Auth JSON
authJsonPath.help: Source auth.json copied into the isolated CODEX_HOME when needed.

configTomlPath.label: Config TOML
configTomlPath.help: Source config.toml copied into the isolated CODEX_HOME when needed.

heartbeatMs.label: Heartbeat
heartbeatMs.help: Heartbeat interval while a Codex task is still running.

approvalTtlMs.label: Approval TTL
approvalTtlMs.help: How long an approval token stays valid.
